scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/worker" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/worker && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.start: npm run db:migrate && concurrently "npm start -w packages/backend" "npm start -w packages/worker"
